label: BEAGLE genotype likelihoods
description: Genotype-likelihood matrix; one row per variant site, one set of three columns per sample. Registered as input_values.tsv rows of value_kind=beagle.

label: Sites file (chrom, pos, ref, alt)
description: The site list a BEAGLE was computed over. Registered as site_sets.tsv rows.
intended_use: pairs with BEAGLE; defines the variant-site axis

label: Sample set (catflist)
description: Ordered list of sample_ids; the WHO axis. Registered as sample_sets.tsv rows.
intended_use: identifies which samples each layer is computed on

label: Group / metadata table
description: Per-sample labels (family, population, batch, karyotype). Registered as group_sets.tsv rows.
intended_use: row partitioning for FST / dxy / popstats

label: Interval / coordinate scope
description: Genomic intervals (chrom, start, end). Registered as interval_sets.tsv rows.

label: ngsRelate pairwise relatedness
description: Per-pair relatedness coefficients (theta, IBS0/1/2, KING) over a sample_set × interval × site_set scope. Emitted by analysis_id=ngsrelate.
intended_use: kinship QC, family detection, pedigree input

label: ngsPedigree pedigree
description: Reconstructed trios / family graph from a relatedness_res. Emitted by analysis_id=ngspedigree.

label: Mendelian-error rate per trio
description: Per-trio Mendelian-error rate over an interval. Emitted by analysis_id=mendelian.
intended_use: trio QC, sites filtering, sequencing-error model

label: Composite popstats (FST / dxy / piN / piS)
description: Window-wise composite popstats result; downstream readers split into per-metric layers. Emitted by analysis_id=popstats.
intended_use: manuscript path B: FST scans, divergence, diversity

label: Pairwise FST in windows
description: Single-metric FST slice. Emitted by analysis_id=fst_pairwise.

label: Nucleotide diversity θπ in windows
description: Single-metric π slice. Emitted by analysis_id=theta_pi.

label: Between-group divergence dxy in windows
description: Single-metric dxy slice. Emitted by analysis_id=dxy.

label: Per-sample karyotype assignment
description: Per-sample arrangement-call sheet (sample_id, candidate_id, karyotype ∈ {0,1,2}). Manually curated or produced by an arrangement-calling module not yet registered here.
intended_use: defines karyotype groups for popstats / mendelian per_candidate

label: Candidate inversion intervals
description: List of candidate inversion intervals (candidate_id, chrom, start, end). Produced by an inversion-calling module not yet registered here; today read from inversion-atlas exports.
intended_use: the candidate axis for path A and path B
